title: mimulus guttatus var. depauperatus
intro: Mimulus guttatus var. depauperatus, also known as skunk flower, is a variety of the yellow monkey flower plant, native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for relieving anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mimulus guttatus var. depauperatus include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the flowers in hot water or mixing them with other herbs for a relaxing tea.
